original_text:
Dear Teacher,

I hope you are fine. Last weekend I go to beach with my family in Pattaya. The weather is very good and sunny. I swim in the sea and play football with my brother. My mother cook delicious food for us. I am very happy and I don't want to come back.

Best regards,
Somchai
corrected_text:
Dear Teacher,

I hope you are fine. Last weekend I went to the beach with my family in Pattaya. The weather was very good and sunny. I swam in the sea and played football with my brother. My mother cooked delicious food for us. I was very happy and I didn't want to come back.

Best regards,
Somchai

sentence_pairs.original:
Dear Teacher,

I hope you are fine.
Last weekend I go to beach with my family in Pattaya.
sentence_pairs.corrected: I hope you are fine. Last weekend I went to the beach with my family in Pattaya.

sentence_pairs.original: The weather is very good and sunny.
sentence_pairs.corrected: The weather was very good and sunny. I swam in the sea and played football with my brother. My mother cooked delicious food for us. I was very happy and I didn't want to come back. Best regards, Somchai

corrected_with_markup:
Dear Teacher,

I hope you are fine. Last weekend I <u>went</u> to <u>the</u> beach with my family in Pattaya. The weather <u>was</u> very good and sunny. I <u>swam</u> in the sea and <u>played</u> football with my brother. My mother <u>cooked</u> delicious food for us. I <u>was</u> very happy and I <u>didn't</u> want to come back.

Best regards,
Somchai
